message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9FF
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #333333
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #DDDDDD
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #999999
}

actor User as user
database Datastore as ds

box "Application Layer" #DDDDDD
  participant "«@Controller»\nSubscriptionController" as ctrl <<C>>
end box

box "Domain Model Layer" #DDDDDD
  participant "«@Bean»\nSubscriptionServiceImpl" as svc <<C>>
end box

box "Infrastructure Layer" #DDDDDD
  participant "«@Bean»\nJpaSubscriptionRepository" as jpa <<C>>
  participant "«@Repository»\nSubscriptionPersistenceJpaRepository" as spr <<C>>
end box

user -> ctrl : 
activate ctrl

ctrl -> svc : 
note over ctrl,svc
via SubscriptionService
end note
activate svc

svc -> jpa :
note over svc,jpa
via SubscriptionRepository
end note
activate jpa

jpa -> spr :
note over jpa,spr
via Spring data repository
end note
activate spr

spr -> ds :
activate ds
ds --> spr :
deactivate ds

spr --> jpa :
deactivate spr

jpa --> svc :
deactivate jpa

svc --> ctrl :
deactivate svc

ctrl --> user :
deactivate ctrl

@enduml
